description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsPurple bag with panelled front and backPrinted patch in frontOne main zippered compartmentInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket at backOne adjustable and removable handle for carrying easeMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 21 cmWidth: 36 cmDepth: 12 cm
